title: EvidenceBundle
description: A bundle of evidence refs, receipts, and logs attached to a subject object such as a release, run, export, or promotion decision.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

subjectRef.description: Ref to the object this evidence bundle supports.

artifactRefs.description: Refs to build outputs, manifests, or related artifacts.

receiptRefs.description: Refs to receipts, attestations, or signature outputs.

logRefs.description: Refs to logs, event streams, or trace bundles.

decisionRefs.description: Refs to policy, promotion, or execution decisions.

generatedBy.description: Optional subject or service that generated the evidence bundle.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the evidence bundle was generated.
